title: Canaries in the coal mine? How AI could reshape work in Ireland
description: What's behind the recent tech job cuts, and with artificial intelligence on the rise are Irish jobs actually on the line?
content:
In recent weeks there has been a proliferation of announcements and statements linked to the future of work and the impact of artificial intelligence on the labour force and wider economy.

title: Nvidia chief executive Jensen Huang expected to visit South Korea
description: Huang's visit comes as a global artificial intelligence boom drives strong demand for Samsung Electronics and SK hynix memory chips, helping support South Korea's economic growth and stock market rally.
content:
SEOUL: Nvidia chief executive Jensen Huang is expected to visit South Korea next week, a source familiar with the matter told AFP on Saturday (May 30), as the country rides a boom in artificial intelligence.

title: Sink or swim: As an AI wave sweeps China, its workers are adapting fast
description: BEIJING: Shanghai lawyer Xie Jingyi regularly uses artificial intelligence (AI) for work, even though she does not trust it entirely, wary of "hallucinations" or false information presented as fact.
